examples: A coral reef is built by the accretion of tiny, identical organisms.
The implication is that the gases in the mantle came not from the sun but from the early accretion of rocky material.
Planets are believed to emerge from the accretion of particles in a disk of gas and dust as they whirl around the star.
We've watched the accretion of this company's book value accelerate through the 1990s into the 2000s.
Many writers declare that the accretion of knowledge and early preparations would make victory inevitable.
